components.name: Thesis Surface Hero
components.purpose: State the governing thesis that Hoax.ai is not a truth machine.
components.thesis_function: Introduce evidence-risk intelligence and reject truth-machine framing.
components.governance_boundary: Must not imply active classifier, detection tool, or verdict output.
components.allowed_use: Homepage thesis headline and lead paragraph explaining governed evidence-risk intelligence.
components.prohibited_use: Scanner CTA, upload prompt, fake/real result display, truth score, or detection guarantee.
components.notes: Maps to section-thesis and main H1 on index.html.

components.name: Governing Sentence Block
components.thesis_function: Anchor interface language to classify artifact, not perform verdict.
components.governance_boundary: Sentence must remain artifact-bound and non-accusatory.
components.allowed_use: Blockquote and footer governing sentence on thesis surface.
components.prohibited_use: Truth verdict banner, guilt statement, or subject accusation headline.

components.name: Evidence Artifact Boundary Panel
components.purpose: Explain that classification applies to evidence artifacts only.
components.thesis_function: Define artifact scope before posture language.
components.governance_boundary: Must describe artifact or evidence chain, not connected subjects.
components.allowed_use: Evidence posture section describing artifact-bound classification.
components.prohibited_use: Subject profile panel, person risk card, or institution judgment block.

components.name: Artifact–Subject Separation Notice
components.purpose: Make artifact-subject separation visible on the public surface.
components.thesis_function: Prevent transfer of artifact posture to people, institutions, or events.
components.governance_boundary: Must state separation explicitly; must not accuse subjects.
components.allowed_use: Governance list items and paragraphs clarifying non-subject scope.
components.prohibited_use: Deceptive person label, guilty institution callout, or fraud-by-association UI.
components.notes: Maps to governance boundary list and artifact-subject paragraph.

components.name: Evidence Posture Layer Explanation
components.purpose: Explain evidence posture pillars as structural layers.
components.thesis_function: Show layered evidence examination without verdict simulation.
components.governance_boundary: Layers describe structure and uncertainty, not detection authority.
components.allowed_use: Pillar grid explaining provenance, coherence, context, and posture classification.
components.prohibited_use: Threat dashboard, scanner beam animation, or fake/real toggle controls.
components.notes: Maps to section-pillars pillar-grid on index.html.

components.name: Self-Application Integrity Notice
components.purpose: Show that governance is version-controlled and inspectable.
components.thesis_function: Embody self-application through visible GitHub-first governance.
components.governance_boundary: Must describe inspectable governance, not enterprise service availability.
components.allowed_use: GitHub-first governance section referencing version-controlled policy files.
components.prohibited_use: API access panel, enterprise signup CTA, or live service status badge.
components.notes: Maps to section-github GitHub-first governance content.

components.name: Planned-Not-Claimed Layer Notice
components.purpose: Frame future layers as planned, not live.
components.thesis_function: Prevent future capability from reading as active tool availability.
components.governance_boundary: Must use planned or under development framing without live tool implication.
components.allowed_use: Next layer section listing taxonomy, standard, reference, and protocol as under development.
components.prohibited_use: Now available banner, operational classifier label, or operational service claim.
components.notes: Maps to section-next planned layers list.

components.name: Governance Boundary Rail
components.purpose: List explicit governance prohibitions on the thesis surface.
components.thesis_function: Make boundaries visible through structured refusal statements.
components.governance_boundary: Refusals must be explicit; must not contradict with tool-implying visuals.
components.allowed_use: Governance boundary section with bullet list of prohibited claims and behaviors.
components.prohibited_use: Contradictory scanner UI, upload panel, or score meter adjacent to boundary list.

components.name: Source/Claim Integrity Reference Link Block
components.purpose: Point to inspectable governance and source discipline without implying live reports.
components.thesis_function: Connect interface to governed reference infrastructure.
components.governance_boundary: References governance files only; no public report or API implication.
components.allowed_use: GitHub governance visibility copy referencing decision logs and policy boundaries.
components.prohibited_use: Public report download, API documentation CTA, or scored evidence export.
components.notes: Maps to GitHub governance visibility paragraphs.

components.name: Deployment Deferred Notice Internal
components.purpose: Record that external deployment remains deferred per Sprint 1C gate.
components.thesis_function: Prevent interface from implying domain-connected live service.
components.governance_boundary: Internal registry notice only unless explicitly approved for public use later.
components.allowed_use: Internal documentation, audits, and deployment gate references.
components.prohibited_use: Public homepage banner stating service is operational on hoax.ai domain.
components.notes: Not mapped to current public index.html surface.
